title: athyrium fuliginosum
intro: Athyrium fuliginosum, also known as the black spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Athyrium fuliginosum can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional herbal preparations, such as salves and tinctures.
